disambiguated.context: I picked a cheaper restaurant for my birthday dinner with my Guinean friend and my Swiss friend because sometimes friends tend to be too polite even when they can't afford something fancy. Though my Swiss friend would be fine with it, my Guinean friend is going through a hard time with bills and such after losing his job so might not want to go out to a 5-star buffet.
disambiguated.question: Who could afford the fancy restaurant?
